name: Wattanapat Hospital Trang Public Company Limited
summary: Wattanapat Hospital Trang Public Company Limited owns and operates hospitals and clinics in Thailand. The company offers medical services in the field of hemodialysis, surgery, gynecology, delivery and newborn, clinical pediatrics, skin and beauty, dental clinic, physical therapy clinic, and ophthalmology, as well as ear, nose, and throat; and operates dialysis, X-ray, MRI, and wellness centers. It serves people through its 120-bed hospital. The company was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Trang, Thailand.
